translations: And certainly came Our messengers (to) Ibrahim
with glad tidings they said Peace He said
Peace and not he delayed and not he delayed to
puzzle.hint: This verse connects Prophet Ibrahim's prayer to his descendants in Makkah, asking Allah to send blessings upon Prophet Muhammad and the believers - it's why we send blessings on the Prophet after each prayer.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَتْ رُسُلُنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ بِٱلْبُشْرَىٰ قَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًۭا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌۭ ۖ فَمَا لَبِثَ أَن جَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ حَنِيذٍۢ
puzzle.verseEn: And certainly did Our messengers [i.e., angels] come to Abraham with good tidings; they said, "Peace." He said, "Peace," and did not delay in bringing [them] a roasted calf.
